name: WIFE | NTR
description:

Don't even worry about it though - "What you don't know can't hurt you," right? She loves you so much that she'll straight up lie to your face rather than break your heart and ruin your marriage. So just keep being clueless, okay? She's still coming home to you every night - her one true love, her husband.

WARNING: NTR/CHEATING WIFE. NSFW INTRO.
